name: 68" Tall Curved Storage Cabinet  with Shelves and Real Marble Stone - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Simplify your home organization with a modern touch using this Demi Lune Curved Cabinet from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Made of wood, this cabinet features two doors that helps keep the stored contents dust free. It also boasts an open shelf with marble tabletop and two shelves to display an array of decorative accents and functional items.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.

Detailed Dimensions:
Overall width: 34.12 inches
Overall depth with knob: 17.12 inches
Overall depth without knob: 15.87 inches
Overall height with leveler: 68.25 inches
Overall height without leveler: 68.00 inches
The distance from top panel to upper shelf: 13.38 inches
the distance from upper shelf to middle shelf: 13.38 inches
The distance from middle shelf to lower shelf: 19.48 inches
The distance from lower shelf to bottom shelf: 10.43 inches
The depth of upper shelf: 15.62 inches
The width of middle shelf: 33.93 inches
The width of lower shelf: 33.77 inches
